Argument Reference

  • compartment_id - (Required) The compartment OCID. Changing this value forces a new resource.
  • subnet_id - (Required) The subnet OCID. Changing this value forces a new resource.
  • service_id - (Required) The service identifier. Changing this value forces a new resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • security_attributes - (Optional) (Updatable) Security attributes for this resource.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly name for the private service access.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) A description of the private service access.
  • nsg_ids - (Optional) (Updatable) The network security groups associated with the private service access VNIC.
  • ipv4_ip - (Optional) The private IPv4 address for the access point. Changing this value forces a new resource.
